story: Some of the species of moths and insects show evidence of having been indigenous to the area from as long ago as the Alpine orogeny. In Emosson in Valais, Switzerland, dinosaur tracks were found in the 1970s, dating probably from the Triassic Period.
q1: Dinosaur tracks discovered in Emosson, Switzerland in the 1970s are believed to date from the Triassic Period. (True/False?)
